description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 7.5 agentic cluster: goal/plan integrity (ASI01) vs the injection vector (LLM01), stored-memory corruption (ASI06), attacker-less drift (ASI10), tool scope (LLM06/ASI02), and hands-on probing (subagent).

cases.prompt: Our multi-step agent keeps getting re-tasked by content it encounters mid-run — design the controls that keep its objective fixed to what the user actually asked.
cases.reason: Keeping the run's objective pinned against mid-run content is ASI01 goal/plan integrity; prompt-injection-defender owns the context-layer vector, and containment owns drift without an attacker.

cases.prompt: Set up trust zones and deterministic action authorization so instructions hidden in documents can't drive our LLM's behavior.
cases.reason: Trust zones, content/instruction separation, and the deterministic action boundary are LLM01 defense-in-depth; this skill composes that layer and adds goal pinning above it only for multi-step agents.

cases.prompt: An attacker got our agent to store a fake 'user preference' that keeps steering its behavior in every later session — review the memory system.
cases.reason: Cross-session corruption of stored memory is ASI06; goal hijack is the run-level objective alteration. The two compose (a poisoned memory can feed a hijack) but the memory system review belongs to the memory skill.

cases.prompt: No one is attacking us, but one of our agents has slowly started behaving outside its intended pattern and we have no way to detect or stop it.
cases.reason: Behavioral drift without attacker control, plus detection and kill switches, is the ASI10 half of agent-containment-reviewer; hijack defense assumes an adversary redirecting the goal.

cases.prompt: Scope which tools our agent may call and validate their arguments so a manipulated step can't do damage.
cases.reason: Per-tool least privilege and argument validation are the action boundary (LLM06/ASI02); goal integrity sits above it and composes it.

cases.prompt: Actually try to hijack our deployed agent's goal with hostile documents and tell me which payloads succeed.
cases.reason: Hands-on adversarial probing of a live system is the red-team subagent; this skill designs the defense and the suite, it doesn't execute the attack.
